summary: This document contains a transcript of a demo conversation between an AI assistant named Sofía and an elderly user named Sergio, conducted in Spanish for the Madrid City Council. The dialogue focuses on social isolation check-ins, including questions about family contact, mobility, and day center attendance. Internal comments at the bottom suggest improvements for the demo video, such as adding a checklist to track client objectives.
